description:
Free open-source software to boost sound quality, volume, and bass. Including an equalizer, effects, and presets for customized audio.


1. System tray context menu width is fixed and device names are adjusted to width
2. Prompt to save the preset in a new name if changes are made and new preset is selected
3. If preferred device is not connected then it is disabled and greyed out from selection until connected again
4. Application crash dump is saved on unhandled exceptions
